title: Operational Identity Consolidated
situation: Through active service, the unit standardizes its militarized presentation and command-response behavior.
knows: Uniform symbols (red cloaks, conical hats) reinforce unit cohesion and recognition
Weapons readiness is essential to their function
Brief, obedient, coordinated communication increases effectiveness
does_not_know: Any mandate to alter their command structure
Any acceptable condition for refusing Roz Kolora's orders
